response.overview: “Rooted in Yesterday” follows a man mourning the loss of a loved one, as he cares for a flower she gave him. Each day, he speaks to it, preserving the connection to her memory. As the flower wilts, the man reflects on their shared moments, and softly acknowledges, he slowly comes to accept his grief, finding peace in honoring the past and the love he’s lost. “Rooted in Yesterday” is a meditation on memory, loss, and the gentle healing that comes from holding on to what remains.
response.tagline: A meditation on memory, loss, and the gentle healing.
response.title: Rooted in Yesterday
